nasb.text: Woe to them, for they have strayed from Me! Destruction is theirs, for they have rebelled against Me! I would redeem them, but they speak lies against Me.

esv.text: Woe to them, for they have strayed from me! Destruction to them, for they have rebelled against me! I would redeem them, but they speak lies against me.

cnv.text: 他們有禍了，因為他們離棄了我； 他們遭毀滅，因為他們背叛了我。 我雖然想救贖他們，他們卻對我說謊。

ccb.text: 他们有祸了， 因为他们背弃我！ 他们要被毁灭了， 因为他们背叛我！ 我要救赎他们， 他们却向我撒谎。
